hero.title: Share your contact with a single
hero.subtitle: A physical card with an NFC chip connected to your digital profile. No apps, no friction. Your complete contact, always up to date.

how.label: Process
how.title: As simple as it should be
how.subtitle: From purchase to sharing your contact in less than 48 hours.
how.step1Desc: Select your card and complete payment. Your profile is created automatically.
how.step2Desc: Upload your logo, add your info and configure your buttons. Changes appear instantly.
how.step3Desc: Your card arrives programmed and ready. Hold it to any smartphone and share your contact.

products.label: Products
products.title: Choose your card
products.subtitle: Two materials, same power. Both include unlimited digital profile.
products.pvcDesc: Light, durable and elegant. Perfect for everyday networking.
products.metalDesc: Stainless steel finish. A first impression that won't be forgotten.
products.bizDesc: Volume for teams. Discounts starting at 10 units.

demo.label: Demo
demo.title: This is what your profile looks like
demo.subtitle: The page that opens when someone taps your card. Elegant, fast, and completely yours to edit anytime.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.q1: Do I need an app to use the card?
faq.a1: No. Your card works with the phone's native NFC. The person scanning you only needs their smartphone — no download required.
faq.q2: Can I update my profile later?
faq.a2: Yes, as many times as you want at no extra cost. Change your number, email, or title — updates reflect in real time.
faq.a3: We program and ship in 1-3 business days. Delivery in 5-10 business days to the US and Latin America.
faq.q4: What if I lose my card?
faq.a4: Your profile stays active. Buy a replacement card and it will be programmed with the same profile URL.
faq.q5: Does it work with iPhones and Android?
faq.a5: Yes. NFC works on iPhones from model 7 (iOS 14+) and on virtually all Android phones since 2015.

cta.title: Stop handing out forgotten paper cards
cta.subtitle: Your next connection deserves a first impression that matches.

footer.tagline: The business card of the future. NFC + unlimited digital profile, one payment.
